title: Router policy and delegation
body: Use a lightweight router to delegate user requests to the right specialist workflow while preserving traceable decisions.

title: Memory and session state
body: Persist compact session facts and retrieval summaries so downstream calls can use context without replaying the whole transcript.

title: Retrieval pipeline
body: Blend lexical filters with semantic ranking to pull the most relevant context for grounded responses and evaluations.

title: Evaluation harness
body: Track answer quality, latency, and policy regressions with a repeatable test suite before promoting workflow changes.

title: Agent orchestration runtime
body: Coordinate planner, executor, and reviewer roles behind a single API while keeping each step observable and bounded.
